current_source_alignment.alignment: Policies should constrain anon/authenticated/service-role behavior by row and operation rather than broad public grants.
Database tests, especially RLS policy tests, should be run and evidenced before release claims.
pgTAP provides database-level assertions for policies, functions, and security behavior.
When row security is enabled, row access must be allowed by policy; absent policies default to deny for normal users.
Tenant and object-level access control claims require verification evidence, including negative tests.
